nasb.text: Then they came to Gilead and to the land of Tahtim-hodshi, and they came to Dan-jaan and around to Sidon,

esv.text: Then they came to Gilead, and to Kadesh in the land of the Hittites; and they came to Dan, and from Dan they went around to Sidon,

cnv.text: 然後又到了基列和他停．合示地，再到了但．雅安，並繞過了西頓，

ccb.text: 然后，他们到基列、他停·合示地区、但·雅安，绕到西顿，
